drl:
rule "R0"
when
    accumulate( T1(f2 == true, f1 != false, $s0_0 : f0); $a0_0 : average($s0_0) )
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    T1($b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f1)
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    not T0(f2 == true, f0 >= "alpha", f2 != true || f1 in (100, 3.0, 3.5) || !(f1 in (1, 12, -3)))
then
end
rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T0()
    not T1()
then
    insertLogical(new T1($p3_0.getF1(), $p3_0.isF2(), $p3_0.isF2()));
end
rule "R4"
salience -8
when
    ( T0() and not T1() )
    or
    ( T0() and not T1() )
    or
    ( T0() and not T1() )
then
end
